name: POE Power Adapter 24V2A
title: POE Power Adapter 24V2A
description: MikroTik POE24V2A Power Adapter (24V 2A) is a reliable and efficient power supply designed for powering PoE-enabled devices that do not have their own built-in power source. It provides a stable 24V DC output with a current of up to 2A, delivering a total power of 48W, which is ideal for a variety of MikroTik routers, switches, and other network equipment. The adapter supports a wide input voltage range of 100–240V AC at 50/60Hz, making it suitable for use in most countries worldwide. Built with durability and performance in mind, the POE24V2A ensures steady and safe power delivery, helping maintain uninterrupted network operation even under continuous use. Its compact design allows for easy installation in both home and professional setups. Whether you’re replacing an old adapter or expanding your network infrastructure, this PoE power supply provides a practical, efficient, and dependable solution for keeping your MikroTik devices powered and performing at their best.
